user:
What does Z4 mean?

CONTEXT:
- Readiness: Green (Recovered)
- Sport: running
- Level: intermediate
original: Z4 is your Threshold zone — great for building your threshold and race pace! You'll feel hard, controlled discomfort. RPE around 6-7. Keep it up!
fixed: Z4 sits at RPE 6-7 — hard, controlled discomfort. What's happening under the hood: raising your threshold — the point where effort starts to feel really hard gets pushed higher, so race pace feels easier. Breathing check: a few words at a time.

user:
What happens in Z3?

CONTEXT:
- Readiness: Green (Recovered)
- Sport: running
- Level: intermediate
original: Z3 is your Tempo zone. It builds lactate clearance and tempo endurance. You should feel working, short sentences only — RPE around 4-5. Talk test: short sentences.
fixed: Z3 is your Tempo zone. It builds lactate clearance (your body processing and clearing effort) — your body getting better at processing effort so you can hold pace longer. You should feel working, short sentences only — RPE around 4-5. Talk test: short sentences.
